rationale: Section 11.438 governs late applications for veteran's organization exemptions under §11.23(a). It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b) and imposes no constraints on exemption amounts.
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for a veteran's organization exemption under Section 11.23(a) after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43
_note: No conflict; §11.438 addresses veteran's organization exemptions, not residence homestead exemptions.
